mapper.sql: ID, PAYMENT_TITLE, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, PAYEE_NAME, APPLICANT_ID, APPLICANT_NAME, APPROVAL_STATUS, APPLY_TIME, EXPECTED_PAYMENT_TIME, PAYMENT_TYPE, PROC_INST_ID, PROC_DEF_ID, PAYMENT_TYPE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO BPM_APPLICATION_EXAMPLE (
) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{paymentTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{payeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicantId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applicantName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expectedPaymentTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{paymentType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE BPM_APPLICATION_EXAMPLE SET PAYMENT_TITLE = #{paymentTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_AMOUNT = #{paymentAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PAYEE_NAME = #{payeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPLICANT_ID = #{applicantId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, APPLICANT_NAME = #{applicantName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPROVAL_STATUS = #{approvalStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPLY_TIME = #{applyTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, EXPECTED_PAYMENT_TIME = #{expectedPaymentTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, PAYMENT_TYPE = #{paymentType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BPM_APPLICATION_EXAMPLE WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM BPM_APPLICATION_EXAMPLE ORDER BY APPLY_TIME DESC
